title: Color Theme - Switching theme while Phone is set to Dark Theme
scenario: Color Theme switching does not apply immediately or persist across app sessions on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on a phone set to Light Theme.
2. Go to Home → Account → Color Theme.
3. Verify the default selection is 'Follow Phone Theme'.
4. Tap 'Dark Theme'.
5. Observe the app UI across all screens: Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, DFU screens, Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, Onboardings.
6. Close and reopen the app.
7. Go to Account → Color Theme and verify 'Dark Theme' is still selected.
8. Tap 'Dark Theme' again (the currently selected theme).
9. Change phone system theme to Dark Theme.
10. Go to Account → Color Theme and tap 'Light Theme'.
11. Observe the app UI across all screens again.
12. Close and reopen the app.
13. Go to Account → Color Theme and verify 'Light Theme' is still selected.
14. Tap 'Light Theme' again (the currently selected theme).
15. Change phone system theme back to Light Theme.
16. Go to Account → Color Theme and tap 'Follow Phone Theme'.
17. Change phone system theme to Dark Theme and verify the app follows the phone theme.
18. Change phone system theme back to Light Theme and verify the app follows the phone theme.
19. Close and reopen the app.
20. Go to Account → Color Theme and verify 'Follow Phone Theme' is still selected.
expected: The selected color theme is applied immediately across all app screens (Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, DFU screens, Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, Onboardings). The selection persists between app sessions. Tapping the currently selected theme does nothing. 'Follow Phone Theme' correctly mirrors the phone's system dark/light mode.
